case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARIA DE LA CRUZ AVELAR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVELAR, MARIA DE LA CRUZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-220) FILED BY DEFENDANT AVELAR, MARIA DE LA CRUZ

(SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS [X] THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS:[X] PAYMENTS OF $50.00 ON THE 30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING AUGUST 30, 2019 UNTIL AUGUST 30, 2023.[X] THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS $2500.00 WHICH INCLUDES INTEREST ON THE UNPAID BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT. THE ACTUAL AMOUNT OF THAT INTEREST MAY CHANGE IF THE PAYMENTS ARE MADE LATE OR EARLY.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AVELAR, MARIA DE LA CRUZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARIA DE LA CRUZ AVELAR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED APR-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AVELAR, MARIA DE LA CRUZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.
(SC-221) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS(SC-220) & RESPONSE TO REQUEST(SC-221) FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.
